title: raspberry+
description: A lightweight vanilla+ modpack with some fun stuff and optimizations (im not sure if some veritons will work for people other than me)
body:
raspberry+ is currently (as of release) about 99 mods in total and adds things like sodium, oh the biomes we go, do a barrel roll, 1000+ hight limit, cold breath, wind particals, particuals, essential mod, metal pipes, and many more. I recomend adding mods like cool rain or simple voice chat for having fun with friends. and more is to come. my friend asked my to make this for him __________________________________________________________________________________________ WARNING ⚠︎: do not any of the "optinal" mods they might crash you game (for the time being, but it could change) WARNING ⚠︎: DO NOT REMOVE/DISABLE THE 1000+ WORLD BUILD LIMIT MOD, IT WILL BRICK YOUR WORLD WARNING ⚠︎: all "colored" versions are possibly unstable __________________________________________________________________________________________ Check out my other modpacks: [NeoFox](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neoneoneo-re) (remake of neoneoneo) or, [neoneoneo](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neoneoneoneo) __________________________________________________________________________________________ ⓘ: you can fork/remake this modpack at anytime you want but it would be nice (but not required) if you could add this as a link if you do __________________________________________________________________________________________ ⓘ - this modpack is using fabric for 1.21.1 ⓘ - I dont fully recomend using it singleplayer if you have the same or below my specs: a intel i7 7th gen quad core with a intel iris plus 640 graphics. becuase it can get kinda laggy unless you have someone else to play a lan or server with ⓘ - use essical mod for easy co-op play (i dont have the money for a server rn) __________________________________________________________________________________________ join the NeoFox discord: __________________________________________________________________________________________ and have fun __________________________________________________________________________________________ I plan on making 3 other varients of the modpack
what they are red: slightly more than vanilia+ blue: in between v+ and large pack green: just very big
~~i have no idea if they will work for people other than me~~
